151.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer of one who is seated is worth half of the prayer of one who stands.'
151.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat orang yang duduk senilai setengah dari shalat orang yang berdiri.'

152.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ permitted ruqyah for every venomous creature.'
152.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ mengizinkan ruqyah untuk setiap makhluk berbisa.'

153.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The prayer of one who sits is worth half of the prayer of one who stands.'
153.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Shalat orang yang duduk senilai setengah dari shalat orang yang berdiri.'

154.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would bring a vessel and I would drink from it while I was menstruating, then he would take it and place his mouth on the spot where mine had been. And he would bring me a bone and I would eat from it, then he would take it and place his mouth on the spot where mine had been.'
154.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ membawa sebuah wadah dan aku minum darinya sementara aku sedang haid, kemudian beliau mengambilnya dan meletakkan mulutnya di tempat mulutku berada. Dan beliau membawakan aku tulang dan aku makan darinya, kemudian beliau mengambilnya dan meletakkan mulutnya di tempat mulutku berada.'

155.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform ablution, then kiss, then pray without renewing his ablution.'
155.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berwudhu, kemudian mencium, kemudian shalat tanpa memperbarui wudhunya.'

156.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Messenger of Allah, Abu Bakr and Umar sought permission to enter and you permitted them while you were in your state. When Uthman sought permission, you adjusted your garments.' He said: 'O Aisha, should I not be modest with a man whom, by Allah, the angels themselves are modest with?'
156.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, Abu Bakar dan Umar meminta izin masuk dan engkau memberi mereka izin sementara engkau dalam keadaanmu. Ketika Utsman meminta izin, engkau merapikan pakaianmu.' Beliau bersabda: 'Wahai Aisyah, haruskah aku tidak merasa malu dengan seorang pria yang, demi Allah, para malaikat pun merasa malu kepadanya?'

157.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Al-usayla [the small amount of honey] refers to sexual intercourse.'
157.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Al-usayla [sedikit madu] merujuk pada hubungan seksual.'

158.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The toothstick purifies the mouth and pleases the Lord, Mighty and Majestic.'
158.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Siwak membersihkan mulut dan menyenangkan Tuhan Yang Maha Agung dan Mulia.'

159.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I heard the sound of shovels until the last part of the night on Wednesday' — Muhammad said: al-masahi means the movement.
159.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mendengar suara sekop hingga akhir malam pada hari Rabu' — Muhammad berkata: al-masahi berarti gerakan.

160.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the fasting of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She said: 'I never knew him to complete an entire month of fasting without breaking some of it, nor to break a month entirely without fasting some of it, until he passed away.'
160.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai puasa Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah tahu beliau menyelesaikan satu bulan penuh puasa tanpa berbuka sebagian, dan tidak pula berbuka satu bulan penuh tanpa berpuasa sebagian, hingga beliau wafat.'

161.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ heard a man reciting a verse and said: 'May Allah have mercy on him — he has reminded me of a verse I had forgotten.'
161.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mendengar seorang pria membaca sebuah ayat dan bersabda: 'Semoga Allah merahmatinya — ia telah mengingatkanku tentang ayat yang telah aku lupakan.'

162.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever maintains ties of kinship, Allah maintains ties with him; and whoever severs ties of kinship, Allah severs ties with him.'
162.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang menyambung tali silaturahmi, Allah menyambung hubungan dengannya; dan barangsiapa yang memutus tali silaturahmi, Allah memutus hubungan dengannya.'

163.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O Allah, be gentle with whoever is gentle with my ummah, and make things difficult for whoever makes things difficult for them.'
163.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berdoa: 'Ya Allah, berlaku lembutlah kepada siapa saja yang berlaku lembut kepada umatku, dan persulitlah siapa saja yang mempersulit mereka.'

164.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to say after the salam: 'O Allah, You are Peace and from You comes peace. Blessed are You, O Possessor of Majesty and Honor.'
164.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mengucapkan setelah salam: 'Ya Allah, Engkau adalah As-Salam dan dari-Mu datang kedamaian. Maha Berkah Engkau, wahai Pemilik Keagungan dan Kemuliaan.'

165.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'People used to work by themselves and would come to the Jumu'ah prayer in their working clothes, and it was said to them: "If only you would bathe."'
165.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Orang-orang biasa bekerja sendiri dan datang ke shalat Jumat dalam pakaian kerja mereka, dan dikatakan kepada mereka: "Alangkah baiknya jika kalian mandi."'

166.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never, under any circumstances, abandoned four rak'ahs before Dhuhr and two rak'ahs before Fajr.'
166.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah, dalam keadaan apapun, meninggalkan empat rakaat sebelum Dhuhur dan dua rakaat sebelum Fajar.'

167.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If a man has an hour of the night set aside for prayer and falls asleep during it, his reward for that prayer is recorded for him, and his sleep is considered a charity given to him by Allah.'
167.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika seseorang memiliki waktu di malam hari yang ia tentukan untuk shalat dan ia tertidur di dalamnya, pahalanya untuk shalat itu tetap dicatat untuknya, dan tidurnya dianggap sebagai sedekah yang diberikan Allah kepadanya.'

168.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the Prophet's ﷺ night prayer. She said: 'He sleeps at the beginning of the night and rises at the end of it.'
168.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang shalat malam Nabi ﷺ. Ia berkata: 'Beliau tidur di awal malam dan bangun di akhirnya.'

169.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Indeed, the most hated of men to Allah is the one who is most contentious and quarrelsome.'
169.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya orang yang paling dibenci Allah adalah orang yang paling suka bertengkar dan berselisih.'

170.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I never looked at the private part of the Prophet ﷺ' — or 'I never saw the private part of the Prophet ﷺ.'
170.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah melihat aurat Nabi ﷺ' — atau 'Aku tidak pernah melihat aurat Nabi ﷺ.'

171.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ commanded her to seek ruqyah for the evil eye.
171.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk mencari ruqyah untuk mata jahat (ain).

172.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away without appointing a successor. Had he been going to appoint one, he would have appointed Abu Bakr or Umar.'
172.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ wafat tanpa menunjuk pengganti. Jika beliau hendak menunjuk seseorang, beliau pasti menunjuk Abu Bakar atau Umar.'

173.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ woke from sleep and said: 'O Aisha, did you not see that Allah has guided me regarding what I asked Him about?' Then he went to the well and said: 'This is the well I was shown. By Allah, its water is like henna soak and its palm trees are like the heads of devils.' Aisha said: 'Could you not have exposed it?' He said: 'By Allah, Allah has healed me and I dislike stirring up evil among people.'
173.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ terbangun dari tidurnya dan berkata: 'Wahai Aisyah, tidakkah kamu melihat bahwa Allah telah membimbingku mengenai apa yang aku tanyakan kepada-Nya?' Kemudian beliau pergi ke sumur dan berkata: 'Ini adalah sumur yang ditunjukkan kepadaku. Demi Allah, airnya seperti rendaman inai dan pohon kurmanya seperti kepala setan.' Aisyah berkata: 'Tidakkah engkau bisa membongkarnya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Demi Allah, Allah telah menyembuhkanku dan aku tidak suka menimbulkan keburukan di antara orang-orang.'

174.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ was told that the sorcery was done by Labid ibn al-A'sam the Jew, using a comb, hair clippings, and a palm spathe of a male tree in the well of Dharwan. The Prophet ﷺ went to the well and returned to Aisha saying: 'By Allah, its water is like henna soak and its palm trees are like the heads of devils.' She said: 'O Messenger of Allah, burn it.' He said: 'No, as for me, Allah has healed me, and I feared stirring up evil among people.'
174.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ diberitahu bahwa sihir itu dilakukan oleh Labid bin al-A'sham si Yahudi, menggunakan sisir, potongan rambut, dan spatula kurma jantan di sumur Dharwan. Nabi ﷺ pergi ke sumur dan kembali kepada Aisyah sambil berkata: 'Demi Allah, airnya seperti rendaman inai dan pohon kurmanya seperti kepala setan.' Ia berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, bakarlah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak, adapun aku, Allah telah menyembuhkanku, dan aku khawatir menimbulkan keburukan di antara orang-orang.'

175.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to bathe from a state of major impurity from a single vessel.'
175.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku dan Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mandi dari keadaan junub dari satu wadah yang sama.'

176.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would give me a bone and I would gnaw on it, then he would take it and place his mouth on the spot where mine had been. He would give me a vessel and I would drink, then he would take it and place his mouth on the spot where mine had been.'
176.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberiku tulang dan aku menggigitnya, kemudian beliau mengambilnya dan meletakkan mulutnya di tempat mulutku berada. Beliau memberiku wadah dan aku minum, kemudian beliau mengambilnya dan meletakkan mulutnya di tempat mulutku berada.'

177.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The circumambulation of the House, the walking between al-Safa and al-Marwa, and the casting of pebbles at the Jamarat were instituted for the establishment of the remembrance of Allah Almighty.'
177.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tawaf mengelilingi Ka'bah, sa'i antara al-Shafa dan al-Marwah, dan melempar kerikil di Jamarat ditetapkan untuk menegakkan dzikir kepada Allah Yang Maha Agung.'

178.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recite: "Farawh wa rayhan" with a raised ra [a Quranic variant recitation of Surah Al-Waqi'ah verse 89].
178.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ membaca: "Farawh wa rayhan" dengan ra yang ditinggikan [bacaan Quran alternatif dari Surah Al-Waqi'ah ayat 89].

179.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'O Abu Salama, beware of land disputes, for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "Whoever wrongfully takes a handspan of land, it will be placed around his neck on the Day of Resurrection from seven earths."'
179.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahai Abu Salamah, hati-hatilah dengan sengketa tanah, karena Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Barangsiapa yang mengambil sejengkal tanah secara zalim, itu akan dikalungkan di lehernya pada Hari Kiamat dari tujuh bumi."'

180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ died while leaning against my chest, between my throat and my chin. After seeing how the Messenger of Allah ﷺ died, I will never again dislike the severity of death for anyone.'
180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ wafat sementara bersandar di dadaku, antara tenggorokan dan daguku. Setelah melihat bagaimana Rasulullah ﷺ wafat, aku tidak akan pernah lagi membenci beratnya kematian bagi siapapun.'

181.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'Indeed, a believer can reach, through his good character, the ranks of those who spend their nights in prayer and their days in fasting.'
181.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya seorang mukmin dapat mencapai, melalui akhlaknya yang baik, derajat orang-orang yang shalat sepanjang malam dan berpuasa di siang hari.'

182.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ as he was dying. Beside him was a bowl of water. He would dip his hand into the bowl, wipe his face with the water, and say: "O Allah, help me through the agonies of death."'
182.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ saat beliau menjelang wafat. Di sampingnya ada sebuah mangkuk berisi air. Beliau mencelupkan tangannya ke dalam mangkuk, mengusap wajahnya dengan air, dan berdoa: "Ya Allah, bantulah aku melewati kepedihan sakaratul maut."'

183.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to perform witr with five rak'ahs, not sitting between them until he sat at the fifth, then gave the salam.
183.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukan witir dengan lima rakaat, tidak duduk di antara mereka hingga duduk pada rakaat kelima, kemudian memberi salam.

184.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she asked the Prophet of Allah ﷺ about the plague. He told her that it was a punishment which Allah sent upon whoever He willed, but Allah made it a mercy for the believers.
184.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia bertanya kepada Nabi Allah ﷺ tentang penyakit tha'un. Beliau memberitahunya bahwa itu adalah azab yang Allah kirimkan kepada siapapun yang Dia kehendaki, tetapi Allah menjadikannya rahmat bagi orang-orang yang beriman.

185.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ prayed while she was lying in front of him. He said: 'Are they not your mothers, sisters, and aunts?' [meaning women should not be equated with dogs and donkeys in terms of breaking prayer].
185.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ shalat sementara ia berbaring di hadapannya. Beliau bersabda: 'Bukankah mereka adalah ibu-ibu, saudari-saudari, dan bibi-bibi kalian?' [maksudnya wanita tidak seharusnya disamakan dengan anjing dan keledai dalam hal memutus shalat].

186.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when some companions fell ill in Medina and longed for their homelands, the Prophet ﷺ looked to the sky and said: 'O Allah, make Medina as beloved to us as You made Mecca beloved to us, or even more so. O Allah, bless us in its sa' and its mudd, and transfer its disease to Mahya'a' — which is al-Juhfa — 'as they claimed.'
186.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika beberapa sahabat jatuh sakit di Madinah dan merindukan kampung halaman mereka, Nabi ﷺ memandang ke langit dan berdoa: 'Ya Allah, jadikanlah Madinah sama dicintainya bagi kami sebagaimana Engkau jadikan Mekah dicintai kami, atau bahkan lebih dari itu. Ya Allah, berkahilah kami dalam sa' dan mudd-nya, dan pindahkanlah penyakitnya ke Mahya'a' — yaitu al-Juhfah — 'sebagaimana yang mereka klaim.'

187.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'If a slave woman commits fornication, flog her; if she commits it again, flog her; if she commits it again, flog her; then sell her even for a rope.' And the rope refers to a twisted cord.
187.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jika seorang hamba wanita berzina, cambuklah dia; jika ia melakukannya lagi, cambuklah; jika ia melakukannya lagi, cambuklah; kemudian jualah dia meskipun hanya seharga tali.' Dan tali di sini maksudnya tali yang dipintal.

188.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to make seven takbirs in the two Eid prayers before the recitation, and five in the second rak'ah.
188.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa melakukan tujuh takbir dalam dua shalat Eid sebelum bacaan, dan lima pada rakaat kedua.

189.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The imam is a guarantor and the muadhdhin is entrusted. O Allah, guide the imam and forgive the muadhdhin.'
189.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Imam adalah penjamin dan muadzin adalah orang yang dipercaya. Ya Allah, tunjukilah imam dan ampunilah muadzin.'

190.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'My menstruation began at night while I was beside the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, so I moved back. He said: "What is the matter? Have you given birth?" She said: "No, but I began menstruating." He said: "Tie your garment around you and come back."'
190.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Haidku mulai di malam hari sementara aku di samping Rasulullah ﷺ, maka aku mundur. Beliau berkata: "Ada apa? Apakah kamu baru melahirkan?" Ia berkata: "Tidak, tetapi aku mulai haid." Beliau bersabda: "Ikat pakaianmu dan kembalilah."'

191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ recited aloud during the eclipse prayer.
191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ membaca dengan suara keras dalam shalat gerhana.

192.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Perform some of your prayers in your homes and do not make them graves.'
192.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Lakukan sebagian shalat kalian di rumah-rumah kalian dan jangan jadikan rumah itu seperti kuburan.'

193.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about Waraqa ibn Nawfal. He said: 'I saw him in a dream wearing white garments. I think that if he had been among the people of the Fire, he would not have been wearing white garments.'
193.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang Waraqah bin Nawfal. Beliau bersabda: 'Aku melihatnya dalam mimpi mengenakan pakaian putih. Aku kira jika ia termasuk penghuni neraka, ia tidak akan mengenakan pakaian putih.'

194.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man recited the verse: "Whoever does evil will be recompensed for it." He said: 'We are repaid for every deed — then we are doomed.' This reached the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and he said: 'Yes, the believers are recompensed for it in this world through afflictions of the body and other things that harm them.'
194.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria membaca ayat: "Barangsiapa yang berbuat kejahatan akan dibalas karenanya." Ia berkata: 'Kita dibalas atas setiap perbuatan — maka kita akan binasa.' Hal ini sampai kepada Rasulullah ﷺ dan beliau bersabda: 'Ya, orang-orang mukmin dibalas karenanya di dunia ini melalui penyakit tubuh dan hal-hal lain yang menyakiti mereka.'

195.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Prophet ﷺ rarely smiled broadly. When he saw clouds or wind, his expression would change. She asked: "O Messenger of Allah, when people see clouds they rejoice hoping for rain, but I see your expression change when you see them." He said: "O Aisha, what assures me that there is no punishment in it? Some people were punished by wind, and some people saw the punishment and said: 'This is a rain-bearing cloud.'"'
195.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Nabi ﷺ jarang tertawa lebar. Ketika beliau melihat awan atau angin, ekspresinya berubah. Ia bertanya: "Wahai Rasulullah, ketika orang-orang melihat awan mereka bergembira berharap hujan, tetapi aku melihat ekspresimu berubah ketika melihatnya." Beliau bersabda: "Wahai Aisyah, apa yang membuatku yakin tidak ada azab di dalamnya? Beberapa orang dihukum oleh angin, dan beberapa orang melihat azab dan berkata: 'Ini adalah awan yang membawa hujan.'"'

196.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that her menstruation began at night while the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was praying. She gestured to him with her garment which had blood on it, and he gestured back to her while he was praying to continue.
196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa haidnya mulai di malam hari sementara Rasulullah ﷺ sedang shalat. Ia memberi isyarat kepadanya dengan pakaiannya yang ada darahnya, dan beliau memberi isyarat balik kepadanya sementara beliau dalam shalat untuk melanjutkan.

197.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), Mother of the Believers, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'What is forbidden through breastfeeding is the same as what is forbidden through birth.'
197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Yang diharamkan karena persusuan adalah sama dengan yang diharamkan karena kelahiran.'

198.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Any woman who marries without the permission of her guardian — her marriage is void. If he consummated the marriage, she receives her dowry for what he has taken from her. And if they dispute, then the authority is the guardian of one who has no guardian.'
198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setiap wanita yang menikah tanpa izin walinya — pernikahannya batal. Jika ia telah menyetubuhinya, ia mendapat maharnya atas apa yang ia ambil darinya. Dan jika mereka berselisih, maka penguasa adalah wali bagi yang tidak memiliki wali.'

199.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), wife of the Prophet ﷺ, that she said: 'When an unbeliever among the unbelievers of Quraysh would die and his family would weep over him, saying: "He was a generous host, a warrior" — Allah would increase his punishment because of what they said.'
199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), istri Nabi ﷺ, bahwa ia berkata: 'Ketika seorang kafir dari kaum kafir Quraisy meninggal dan keluarganya menangisinya, berkata: "Ia adalah tuan rumah yang dermawan, seorang pejuang" — Allah akan menambah azabnya karena apa yang mereka katakan.'

200.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man was mentioned before the Messenger of Allah ﷺ favorably, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'But did you not see him learning the Quran?'
200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang pria disebutkan di hadapan Rasulullah ﷺ dengan baik, dan Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidakkah kalian melihat dia mempelajari Al-Quran?'
